The smallest discrete amount of energy t: 可排放或吸收的最小离散能量量

What unit is used to measure frequency?: 用什么单位来衡量频率?

A spectrum containing all wavelengths of: 光谱,包含所有可见光波长且无空白的可见光波长
A spectrum showing only infrared radiati: 仅显示红外辐射的频谱

A continuous rainbow of colors when meas: 在受控制条件下测量的连续彩色彩虹

Emission spectra cannot be used to ident: 不能使用排放光谱来识别元素
